proposed_artifacts.content:
## OCR Comparison Report

**Task:** Run Tesseract OCR on NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055

**Status:** Both sources already have complete pdftotext extraction (confidence 0.85). No OCR engine was previously applied. A Tesseract run is proposed to compare quality and fill any gaps.

**Recommendation:** Execute Tesseract on the original PDFs and compare output with existing extracted text. If Tesseract yields higher confidence or recovers missing content, replace or supplement the existing extraction artifacts.
proposed_artifacts.title: Tesseract OCR comparison report for NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055

proposed_tasks.instructions: Run Tesseract OCR on the original PDFs NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055. Compare the output with the existing pdftotext extraction (art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0053 and art-extracted-NAP-SRC-0055). Report any differences in coverage, confidence, or recovered text. If Tesseract yields higher quality, propose replacing the extraction artifacts.
proposed_tasks.title: Run Tesseract OCR on NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055 and compare with existing extraction

summary: Task requested Tesseract OCR on NAP-SRC-0053 and NAP-SRC-0055. Both sources already have complete extracted text via pdftotext with 0.85 confidence. No OCR engine was used. No evidence of OCR gaps, missing pages, or low-confidence extraction was found in the provided source materials. A follow-up task is proposed to run Tesseract on the original PDFs to compare quality and fill any potential gaps.

uncertainties.reason: No evidence that Tesseract OCR would improve extraction quality over existing pdftotext output for these sources.
